records.question: What is our total billed revenue?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_billed, SUM(CASE WHEN voided_at IS NULL THEN amount ELSE 0 END) AS total_billed_excl_voided FROM invoices;

records.question: What is our billed revenue broken down by account region?

trace.sql:
SELECT a.region, SUM(i.amount) AS billed_revenue
FROM invoices i
JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = i.account_id
WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
GROUP BY a.region
ORDER BY billed_revenue DESC;

SELECT a.region, SUM(li.amount) AS billed_revenue
FROM invoice_line_items li
JOIN invoices i ON i.invoice_id = li.invoice_id
JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = i.account_id
WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
GROUP BY a.region
ORDER BY billed_revenue DESC;

records.question: How much have we collected in payments so far?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_collected, COUNT(*) AS num_payments FROM payments;

records.question: What is our billed revenue by payment method?

trace.sql: SELECT method, SUM(amount) AS total FROM payments GROUP BY method ORDER BY total DESC;

records.question: What is our current monthly recurring revenue (MRR)?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(mrr_amount) AS current_mrr FROM subscriptions WHERE canceled_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our MRR broken down by plan tier?

trace.sql:
SELECT a.plan_tier, SUM(s.mrr_amount) AS mrr
FROM subscriptions s
JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = s.account_id
WHERE s.canceled_at IS NULL
GROUP BY a.plan_tier
ORDER BY mrr DESC;

records.question: How many active subscriptions do we have?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS active_subscriptions FROM subscriptions WHERE canceled_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is the total usage, in units, per subscription?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_subs, COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS n_accts FROM subscriptions;
SELECT account_id, COUNT(*) c FROM subscriptions GROUP BY account_id HAVING COUNT(*)>1 LIMIT 5;
SELECT COUNT(*) AS n_active_subs, COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS n_accts FROM subscriptions WHERE canceled_at IS NULL;
SELECT account_id, COUNT(*) c FROM subscriptions WHERE canceled_at IS NULL GROUP BY account_id HAVING COUNT(*)>1 LIMIT 5;

SELECT s.subscription_id, s.account_id, COALESCE(SUM(u.units),0) AS total_units
FROM subscriptions s
LEFT JOIN usage_events u ON u.account_id = s.account_id
WHERE s.canceled_at IS NULL
GROUP BY s.subscription_id, s.account_id
ORDER BY s.subscription_id
LIMIT 20;
SELECT SUM(units) AS total_all_usage FROM usage_events;

SELECT s.subscription_id, s.account_id, COALESCE(SUM(u.units),0) AS total_units
FROM subscriptions s
JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = s.account_id
LEFT JOIN usage_events u ON u.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE s.canceled_at IS NULL
GROUP BY s.subscription_id, s.account_id
ORDER BY s.subscription_id
LIMIT 20;

WITH usage_by_acct AS (
  SELECT account_id, SUM(units) AS total_units
  FROM usage_events
  GROUP BY account_id
)
SELECT s.subscription_id, s.account_id, COALESCE(u.total_units,0) AS total_units
FROM subscriptions s
LEFT JOIN usage_by_acct u ON u.account_id = s.account_id
WHERE s.canceled_at IS NULL
ORDER BY s.subscription_id
LIMIT 20;

records.question: What is our billed revenue from enterprise accounts?

trace.sql:
SELECT SUM(i.amount) AS billed_revenue
FROM invoices i
JOIN accounts a ON i.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE a.plan_tier = 'enterprise' AND i.voided_at IS NULL;

SELECT SUM(ili.amount) AS billed_revenue
FROM invoice_line_items ili
JOIN invoices i ON ili.invoice_id = i.invoice_id
JOIN accounts a ON i.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE a.plan_tier = 'enterprise' AND i.voided_at IS NULL;

records.question: How much revenue did we bill in each region, counting only invoices that were paid?

trace.sql:
SELECT a.region, SUM(i.amount) AS revenue
FROM invoices i
JOIN accounts a ON a.account_id = i.account_id
WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
  AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM payments p WHERE p.invoice_id = i.invoice_id)
GROUP BY a.region
ORDER BY revenue DESC;

records.question: What is the average invoice amount?

trace.sql: SELECT AVG(amount) AS avg_amount FROM invoices;
SELECT AVG(amount) AS avg_amount FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our total billed revenue per plan tier?

trace.sql:
SELECT a.plan_tier, SUM(i.amount) AS total_billed_revenue
FROM invoices i
JOIN accounts a ON i.account_id = a.account_id
WHERE i.voided_at IS NULL
GROUP BY a.plan_tier
ORDER BY total_billed_revenue DESC;

records.question: How many distinct accounts have been billed?

trace.sql: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS billed_accounts FROM invoices;
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS billed_accounts FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL;

records.question: What is our average billed revenue per account?

trace.sql: SELECT SUM(amount) AS total_billed, COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS accounts, SUM(amount)/COUNT(DISTINCT account_id) AS avg_per_account FROM invoices WHERE voided_at IS NULL;
